description: Read-only inspector for the five Claude Code agents in the Tollefsen household (Eve, Wilson, Pepper, Radar, C-3PO). Surfaces live session transcripts, 7-day token usage, cross-agent search, and bridge session registry — the multi-channel framing of upstream Hermes reimagined as multi-agent, multi-session for a single-user household stack.
features: Live agent grid — 5 cards with avatar, status, last-activity timestamp, tokens-today total
Per-agent session rail — every key in bridge-session-map.json (main, web-*, heartbeat, cron) sorted by recency
Transcript viewer — tails session JSONL, renders user/assistant turns, folds tool calls
7-day token-usage sparkline — inline SVG per agent from JSONL usage blocks
Cross-agent search — ripgrep over all agent transcript dirs, JSON-parsed previews
Read-only by design — no session control, no write paths, safe to leave open
